title: An update on the LPC's work on non-compliance and enforcement
body: "Our role at the Low Pay Commission is to advise the Government on the National Minimum Wage (NMW), including the National Living Wage. Although our core remit is to recommend the level of these rates, the issues of compliance and enforcement are fundamental to minimum wage policy.  We will not be publishing a standalone report on compliance and enforcement this year. Nevertheless, we are about to enter a significant period for compliance and enforcement policy. This note looks at the relevance of our previous recommendations for the Fair Work Agency and explains how we will be taking forward work in this area. "
